headline: IPG Photonics Laser Curing Push With PPG And Whirlpool Draws Valuation Focus
summary: IPG Photonics (NasdaqGS:IPGP) is working with PPG Industries and Whirlpool to introduce PhotoniCURE laser curing systems for powder coatings. The technology is being piloted in Whirlpool manufacturing facilities to cure powder coated parts with shorter curing times and lower energy usage than conventional ovens. The collaboration aims to bring laser based curing to a wider group of industrial customers after initial deployment with Whirlpool. IPG Photonics, known for its fiber laser...
